words.def: an imperfection in an object or machine
words.zh: n. 缺點( flaw的名詞複數 ); 錯誤; 裂痕

words.def: the first of three divisions of the Hebrew Scriptures comprising the first five books of the Hebrew Bible considered as a unit
a state in northwestern United States on the Pacific
a condensed but memorable saying embodying some important fact of experience that is taken as true by many people
the collection of rules imposed by authority
words.zh: n. 法律, 法則, 定律, 法律的制約, 法學, 司法界, 訴訟
